notes: New (optional): keep syncing after you close the app. Sync already survives a locked screen; turn on 'Keep syncing after closing the app' (on the connect-a-computer screen) to keep the desktop synced even after you swipe Pockt away from recent apps. Off by default — nothing changes unless you enable it. Some phone brands may also need you to allow Pockt to auto-start / run in the background.
